page_content:
EPIB612 Epidemiologic Study Design (3 Credits)

Application of epidemiologic study designs, analytic methods used for analysis of cohort, case-control, cross-sectional, and clinical trials research.

Prerequisite: EPIB611.

EPIB620 Chronic Disease Epidemiology (3 Credits)

Overview of prevalence and risk factors for major chronic diseases. Discussion of methodological issues unique to specific chronic disease. Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in SPHL602; or EPIB610.
